prompt: A full-body anime fantasy character design of a young adult male knight-adventurer standing front-facing in a neutral pose on a transparent background with a visible gray checkerboard transparency pattern. He has tousled medium-short warm brown hair with layered, slightly spiky strands and a refined heroic build. His face is intentionally obscured by a soft rectangular blur block centered over the face area. He wears an elaborate royal-blue and dark leather outfit with silver armor and gold filigree trim: 1 long asymmetrical blue cape draped over both shoulders and flowing down both sides, 1 high-collared blue tunic with fitted black-brown leather torso panels, 2 crossed chest straps with buckles, 1 wide layered belt system around the waist, 1 leather side pouch hanging at the left hip, 1 set of silver pauldrons and arm guards, 2 armored gauntlets, 1 split blue tabard skirt with gold edging over dark trousers, 2 silver knee guards, and 2 tall brown armored boots with metallic toe caps and blue gem-like accents. Add intricate fantasy ornamentation throughout, including gold embroidery on the cape and tunic, engraved silver armor details, multiple buckles and straps, and a sunburst-like brooch clasp at the right shoulder. A decorative sword in a blue scabbard hangs at his right hip, with an ornate gold-and-silver hilt visible. The illustration should be clean, highly detailed, polished game character concept art in a refined JRPG style, centered composition, full figure visible from head to toe, crisp linework, soft painterly shading, elegant fantasy aesthetic, no scenery, isolated character cutout.
